ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, PER HAND-WRITTEN NOTATION ON NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF RECEIVED $9,407.11 PAYMENT AND WILL "WRITE OFF" REMAINING BALANCE OF $242.76. AS TO DEFENDANT MYATT III, DENNIS M

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FTF ENGINEERING INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYATT III, DENNIS M $9,477.37 PRINCIPAL, $172.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,649.87, FOR STRUCTURAL ENGINEERING SERVICES NOT PAID FOR BY DEFENDANT (PLUS LATE FEES ON INVOICES, PER CONTRACT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
